author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: Fixed all 28 QA issues. Autocast now returns AutocastCategory and dispatches to matmul_f16_f32 for ReducedPrecision ops. Event log gated behind debug flag. Allocator memory leak fixed (rounded alloc_len). Backward engine checks storage refcount. DDP has timeouts, zero-padding for missing grads, TcpBackend uses Option for connections. LinearFusedBackward gradient count matched to inputs count.
